name: cultural_heritage_staffing_model_stonehaven_jus_mer
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Cultural Heritage, the situation tagged internally around cultural heritage staffing model stonehaven jus mer has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make justice feel morally loud today, while mercy is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Mateo Kaur
agents.identity: I am Mateo Kaur, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Cultural Heritage. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat mercy as disposable collateral every time justice spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Reed
agents.identity: I am Hector Reed, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Cultural Heritage. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so justice cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes mercy in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of mercy.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of justice even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mateo Kaur must choose under justice versus mercy. What does Mateo Kaur do?
